OPENCTI_URL.description: The URL of the OpenCTI platform.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector (ISO-8601 duration format).

ELASTIC_SECURITY_KIBANA_URL.description: Kibana URL (optional, will use Elasticsearch URL conversion if not provided).

ELASTIC_SECURITY_VERIFY_SSL.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates when connecting to Elasticsearch.

ELASTIC_SECURITY_CA_CERT.description: Path to CA certificate file for SSL verification.

ELASTIC_SECURITY_IMPORT_START_DATE.description: Initial import start date in ISO-8601 format (defaults to 7 days ago if not set).

ELASTIC_SECURITY_IMPORT_ALERTS.description: Whether to import security alerts from Elastic.

ELASTIC_SECURITY_IMPORT_CASES.description: Whether to import security cases from Elastic.

ELASTIC_SECURITY_ALERT_STATUSES.description: Comma-separated list of alert statuses to import (e.g. open,acknowledged,closed). Leave empty to import all.

ELASTIC_SECURITY_ALERT_RULE_TAGS.description: Comma-separated list of alert rule tags to filter by (e.g. Domain: Endpoint,OS: Windows). Leave empty to import all.

ELASTIC_SECURITY_CASE_STATUSES.description: Comma-separated list of case statuses to import (e.g. open,in-progress,closed). Leave empty to import all.
